title: Mother and Children
overview: Stories are lies meant to entertain, and idols lie to fans eager to believe. This is Ai's story. It is a lie, but it is also true.

title: Third Option
overview: Ruby wants to be an idol for herself and for the little girl who died from cancer. The real world, however, doesn't care about big dreams: something Aqua knows all too well.

title: Manga-Based TV Drama
overview: Aqua agrees to Kana's request, but not for the reason she wants. There's a connection between Masaya Kaburagi and Ai, which leads Aqua to the set of a TV drama for answers.

title: Actors
overview: Kana's resolve remains strong despite her washed up reputation. Aqua sets the stage for her with a bold move that flips the script, which leads to opportunities for them both.

title: Reality Dating Show
overview: Despite different motivations, Aqua, Ruby and Kana’s key to success in the entertainment industry is the same; to achieve their goals, they need to play the game.

title: Egosurfing
overview: Remember what you said in righteous outrage online? There were consequences. You never saw them, but that didn't make them any less real, nor hold you any less accountable.

title: Buzz
overview: Left reeling in the immediate aftermath, Akane's costars unite in friendship and purpose: they will clear their friend's name. They owe her nothing less.

title: First Time
overview: Focused on revenge, Aqua underestimated Akane and gave the talented actress a way to win his heart. If love is a game, Akane is playing for keeps and Kana is falling behind.

title: B Komachi
overview: MEM-cho won't let her second chance go to waste and uses her influence to help grow B Komachi's brand. Meanwhile, Aqua's investigation into Ai's past bears fruit.

title: Pressure
overview: B Komachi's first performance approaches, but the group still needs practice while Kana refuses to be the center. Perhaps a certain expert choreographer could help them shine?

title: Idol
overview: MEM-cho has fans. Ruby has looks. But Kana has...? She’ll need to find the answer before she can be anyone's star. Later, a fresh opportunity sets Aqua on a new path to revenge.

title: Tokyo Blade
overview: The stage is set. The actors are ready. And the curtain rises on the play, Tokyo Blade. However, there is another story aside from the play: that of the actors themselves.

title: Game of Telephone
overview: The creator of Tokyo Blade isn’t happy with the unfaithful adaptation of her manga and demands a revision of the entire script. However, only twenty days remain until opening.

title: Rewriting
overview: Time is dwindling, and a question looms: a faithful Tokyo Blade adaptation or one tailored for theater? Amidst the tension, only one person can convince Abiko to compromise.

title: Emotional Acting
overview: Abiko and GOA collaborate on a new script and now the pressure is on the actors to bring the script to life. However, Aqua soon faces an unexpected challenge during rehearsal.

title: The Curtain Rises
overview: Aqua confides in Akane, revealing his true motives. She vows to remain by his side, but this deepening bond causes Akane’s rivalry with Kana to intensify.

title: Growth
overview: Melt regrets his poor acting in Sweet Today and vows to improve in Tokyo Blade. However, how can a subpar actor stand out among exceptional ones?

title: Sun
overview: Akane became an actress because she idolized Kana and wanted to be like her. However, one should never meet their heroes.

title: Trigger
overview: Their pasts shaped their acting. Kana wanted to shine as an actress, but she compromised to be useful. Meanwhile, Aqua’s childhood trauma led to a unique acting method.

title: Dream
overview: The actors shone brilliantly, and the curtain fell on a successful play, setting the stage for the next performance as Aqua and Taiki press the director for answers.

title: Liberation
overview: Taiki discovers a surprising connection, but reveals something Aqua wasn't expecting. Meanwhile, Ruby hopes one person in particular notices B Komachi's growing fame.

title: Freedom
overview: Aqua doesn't have to live for revenge and can finally look towards a brighter future. But what does this mean for the relationships he's cultivated in pursuit of a killer?

title: Reunion
overview: The past never truly disappears. Aqua and Ruby return to the place they were born… and where, in another life, they also died.

title: Wish
overview: A gruesome discovery finally gives Aqua the closure he needs to begin a new chapter in his life. But as he steps into a brighter tomorrow, Ruby’s descent into darkness begins.

title: Down Bad
overview: Six months have passed since the release of B-Komachi's music video, and lots of things have changed.

title: Calculating
overview: Ruby starts to make her mark as reporter on Dig Deep!

title: Correctness
overview: Things go horribly wrong at the Comiket shoot. Can Dig Deep come back from this?

title: Blind
overview: Aqua confronts Ruby and starts to piece together the puzzle.

title: Casting
overview: Kana's at the end of her rope and decides to try to get back into acting.

title: Idols and Relationships
overview: Kana's encounter with Shima looms over her and the rest of Strawberry Productions.

title: Breakdown
overview: Kana has bounced back, but the scandal still looms large.

title: Plan
overview: Aqua has to face the aftermath of his decision to reveal Ai's secret.

title: Greed and Passion
overview: As the movie project kicks into gear, Masaya Kaburagi goes to work, putting both sides of himself on show.

title: Private Audition
overview: How will Ruby and Akane act out the theme of liar? And how will the audition end?

title: The Beginning
overview: Aqua has a very surprising encounter, and Ruby is close to succumbing under all the pressure.
